comment.body:
Good morning everyone - about to hit the hay here on the us west coast. 

Should be an eventful week with lots of inflection points again. While it’s hard to guess when Trump will say something we know we’ve got March OPEX this Friday. 

Here are some other note worthy events on the US calendar. The bond auctions we 1pm et on Wed and Thurs are likely intraday inflection points to plan for.
